Bartolommeo da Arezzo

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Study of a Flayed Torso (verso)
by Bartolommeo da Arezzo
Italy, 16th century · 1554 · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash over traces of black chalk; incised
←Giuseppe Arcimboldo Aristanemi→
